title: Why Welltower Is A Beaten-Down Buy For Turbulent Times
text: Welltower's stock price is now trading materially below its recent highs. It's seeing a strong rebound in its senior housing segment, with revenue outpacing expense growth.

title: Should Investors Retain Welltower (WELL) Stock for Now?
text: Rise in healthcare expenditure by an aging population and strategic acquisitions are likely to aid Welltower (WELL). Stiff competition and earnings dilution in the near term from asset sales are woes.
